args: ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && VENV="$ROOT/.claude/.faq-venv/bin/python" && VENV_WIN="$ROOT/.claude/.faq-venv/Scripts/python.exe" && if [ -x "$VENV" ]; then exec "$VENV" "$ROOT/.claude/faq_server.py"; elif [ -x "$VENV_WIN" ]; then exec "$VENV_WIN" "$ROOT/.claude/faq_server.py"; elif command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uv run --script "$ROOT/.claude/faq_server.py"; else exec python "$ROOT/.claude/faq_server.py"; fi
